resources.title: A guide to properly get started with GraphQL using Elixir
resources.description: A step-by-step tutorial on how to build a GraphQL API in Elixir using the Phoenix Framework and Absinthe.

resources.title: Absinthe for Large Elixir Applications
resources.description: A practical guide on structuring, scaling, and organizing Absinthe GraphQL schemas in bigger Elixir codebases, with tips for performance, testing, and maintainability.
